name: German Chocolate Pie
recipeInstructions:
1. In a saucepan, combine chocolate and butter. Melt over low heat.
2. Remove from the heat and blend in milk; set aside.
3. In a mixing bowl, combine sugar, cornstarch, and salt. Beat in eggs and vanilla.
4. Blend in melted chocolate; pour into pie shell.
5. Combine coconut and pecans; sprinkle on top of pie.
6. Bake at 375°F for 45 minutes.
